values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

Patch Set 1:

We should at least allow a margin of error of a several days for "1 year ago"?

In any case, I don't think this patch should get a -1 review, since the "lfs find" problem does not relate to the changes in this patch.

 >

 > the "lfs find" problem does not relate to the changes in this
 > patch.

I agreed, tests need be adjusted to make it pass.

commit.message:
LU-6142 llite: Fix style issues for llite/statahead.c

Fix style issues for llite/statahead.c.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
